mano_cua.result_summary: Popover关闭后页面滚动位置保持不变，未发生跳动。通过+按钮添加Heading块后光标自动聚焦到新块中，无需额外点击即可直接输入。两项功能均正常。

The text 'This is a test heading' was typed immediately after clicking Heading without any additional click needed. The heading text is now visible in large, bold heading style, confirming it is a proper Heading block. Scroll position after closing popover overlay remained unchanged. No bugs found in this test run.
